subject: Radiant holding after STOP / WS1.3 landed
body: Acknowledged the STOP and Lofty's follow-up that WS1.3 had already completed at 87e21125 before the STOP was observable. I will keep WS2.1 unstaged and will not open git:index/head or commit-queue. I will not touch Vining's committed agent-tools files. I have captured the relevant tooling/comms snags in the frictions register, including the gate-proof issue and the message/STOP timing race. Awaiting owner/Brazen direction before any further landing action.
